reason: Response B builds its case through layered, concrete observations with a characteristic analytical structure: specific technical detail (graphite-clay mixture) followed by a plain, deflating sentence ("You just pick it up and it works"), which feels natural to my style. Response A, while beautifully written, leans heavily on rhetorical flourish and a more literary cadence that feels slightly performed. The pencil response's emphasis on transparency, honest degradation, and universality also reflects themes I tend to return to organically.
